description: Search and inspect Product Hunt and GitHub daily discovery cards.

commands.description: Return the complete board for the latest or selected date.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for latest.

locale.description: Locale to load: en-US or zh-CN.

source.description: Source filter for returned cards: all, producthunt, or github.

limit.description: Optional maximum cards to return, clamped to 1..50.

include-cards.description: Whether to include cards in the board response. Defaults to true.

commands.description: Return cards filtered by date, locale, source, category, and query.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for latest.

locale.description: Locale to load: en-US or zh-CN.

source.description: Source filter: all, producthunt, or github.

query.description: Search text matched against card fields.

limit.description: Maximum cards to return, clamped to 1..50.

commands.description: Return one full normalized radar card by id.

id.description: Card id such as producthunt:123 or github:123456.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for latest.

locale.description: Locale to load: en-US or zh-CN.
